headline: Is Elevance Health (ELV) Offering Value After A 19.8% One Year Share Price Decline
summary: Wondering whether Elevance Health at around its recent US$319.36 close is pricing in too much hope or not enough optimism about its future cash flows and assets. The stock has moved 1.0% over the last 7 days and 9.6% over the last 30 days, while year to date it is down 9.8% and the 1 year return sits at a 19.8% decline. These mixed returns come as Elevance Health continues to sit at the center of long term conversations about US healthcare spending, insurance costs, and member outcomes...

headline: UnitedHealth Leads Dow Jones As Earnings Heal, Membership Falls
summary: UnitedHealth Group blew past low earnings expectations as health costs came in much lower than forecast as the number of insured members fell.  Shares of the embattled health giant, which recently reclaimed a key long-term technical level, strode higher early Tuesday, boosting the Dow Jones Industrial Average and peers such as Elevance Health, Humana and CVS Health.  Medical costs as a share of premiums fell to 83.9% in Q1, falling 90 basis points from a year ago and undercutting 85.5% forecasts.
